calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust; To Compel Trustee To Account; To Compel Redress For Brea
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust; To Compel Trustee To Account; To Compel Redress For Brea
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Continued To Apr-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato and Kent Hori for John Booth.

Mr. Kato stated that Ms. McGill did not have today's matter on her calendar and that he had contact with her. Mr. Hori stated that mediation was set for March 10, 2011. The matter was continued to April 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust; To Compel Trustee To Account; To Compel Redress For Brea
Off Calendar Feb-15-2011 Continued To Mar-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust; To Compel Trustee To Account; To Compel Redress For Brea
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Continued To Feb-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for John Booth. Michelle McGill for Leighsa Montrose.

Ms. McGill stated that they agreed on mediation and that they were in the process of scheduling mediation. The matter was continued to February 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust; To Compel Trustee To Account; To Compel Redress For Brea
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Continued To Nov-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust; To Compel Trustee To Account; To Compel Redress For Brea
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Continued To Nov-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder for John Booth (Respondent). Michelle McGill for Leighsa Montrose.

Ms. McGill stated that they were in the midst of discovery and that they needed to set an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Feder proposed setting the matter for 90 day status to complete discovery and then set the matter for trial. Counsel stated that they were willing to mediate (order referring the matter pro bono mediation signed in open court). Mediation is to be completed by November 12, 2010. The matter was continued to November 16, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust; To Compel Trustee To Account; To Compel Redress For Brea
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Continued To Aug-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder for John Booth.

The Court noted that Ms. McGill was not present. Mr. Feder stated that discovery still needed to be conducted. The matter was continued to August 17, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
